Help ?
Danger zone

Help

Access Token
Create one at GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Tokens (classic). It needs the gist scope. Your credentials are stored only in this browser and sent directly to GitHub — never to any other server.

Gist ID
The long ID found in your Gist's URL. The data file inside the Gist must be named budget-data.json.
